title: Tests Creator Input Contract
description: Input parameters for the tests-creator skill. Receives a task object with acceptance criteria and generates failing test stubs.

task.description: The task for which to generate tests.

task_type.description: Type of implementation task — influences test strategy

acceptance_criteria.description: List of acceptance criteria to convert into test cases

target_files.description: Source files that will be implemented — tests should cover these

description.description: Full task description for additional context

context.description: Relevant code context: types, interfaces, function signatures expected

existing_tests.description: Paths to existing test files (to read conventions from)

module_patterns.description: Notes on how similar code is tested in the module

codebase_path.description: Absolute path to the project root

branch.description: Feature branch where test files will be committed

issue_number.description: GitHub issue number for commit references

skip_confirmation.description: Must be true for autonomous mode

verify_red.description: Run tests to confirm they fail before reporting done

stub_style.description: How to write failing stubs: forward_declared uses real assertions on non-existent code; todo uses it.todo()

include_edge_cases.description: Generate edge case tests in addition to happy path

max_tests_per_criterion.description: Maximum test cases per acceptance criterion
